description:
As a user,
              I want to verify the navigation links and social media icons.

elements.name: Verify Sign in with Google button functionality

steps.name: the user launches the SmartCliff application
the user is on the Login page
the user clicks the "Sign in with Google" button on the Login page
the user should be redirected to the Google authentication page
